home.title: Smart Computer Academy Kahalgaon | ISO Certified Technical Training Center
home.description: Join Smart Computer Academy, Kahalgaon's most trusted computer education center. ISO Certified diploma courses in DCA, ADCA, PGDCA, Tally with GST. Start your career today!
home.keywords: computer institute Kahalgaon, DCA course Kahalgaon, ADCA Kahalgaon, computer diploma Kahalgaon, Smart Computer Academy, computer coaching Kahalgaon, computer classes Kahalgaon

courses.title: Computer Courses & Diplomas | Smart Computer Academy Kahalgaon
courses.description: Explore our government recognized computer courses. From 2-month certificate to 1-year diploma. Learn DCA, ADCA, Tally, Web Design and more.
courses.keywords: DCA syllabus, ADCA course fees, Tally with GST Bihar, computer diploma courses, professional IT training

about.title: About Smart Computer Academy | Leading IT Training in Bihar
about.description: Smart Computer Academy is dedicated to digital literacy in Bihar. With 15+ years of excellence, we empower students with job-oriented computer skills.
about.keywords: best computer center Bihar, computer education mission, Smart Computer Academy history

franchise.title: Start Computer Franchise in Bihar | Smart Computer Academy Business
franchise.description: Become a partner in Bihar's digital revolution. Open your own Smart Computer Academy franchise. Low investment, high returns, and full academic support.
franchise.keywords: computer franchise Bihar, open computer center, education business opportunity, low investment franchise

contact.title: Contact Smart Computer Academy | Kahalgaon
contact.description: Get in touch for admissions or franchise queries. Visit our Kahalgaon head office or call us at +91 8789302254. Kahalgaon's best IT academy.
contact.keywords: computer institute address Kahalgaon, Smart Computer Academy contact number, admission helpline

verifyCertificate.title: Verify Student Certificate | Smart Computer Academy Official
verifyCertificate.description: Check the authenticity of Smart Computer Academy certificates online. QR-code based instant verification for employers and students.
verifyCertificate.keywords: certificate verification, verify computer diploma, Smart Computer Academy student search

hero.headline: Digital Saksharta se Atmanirbhar Bihar Tak.
hero.subheadline: Ab har ghar se banega ek Computer Expert. Smart Computer Academy lekar aaya hai industry-leading courses sabse saste fees mein.

about.heading: Empowering Bihar Through Digital Education.
about.paragraph1: Smart Computer Academy Bihar ka ek agarni computer education institute hai jo pichle 15 saalo se logo ko digital yug ke liye taiyar kar raha hai. Hamara uddeshya har student ko technical skills se mazboot banana hai.
about.paragraph2: Hum srif degree nahi, job-ready skills dete hai. Hamare DCA aur ADCA courses Bihar ke students ke liye vishesh roop se design kiye gaye hai taki wo sarkari aur private jobs mein safal ho sake.
about.mission: Bihar ke har block aur gaon tak gunvatta-purna (quality) computer shiksha pahunchana.
about.vision: Bihar ko India ka digital hub banana aur yuvaon ko berozgari se mukti dilana.

testimonials.name: Amit Ranjan
testimonials.text: Skill Shakti Academy Patna mein join karne ke baad mera confidence bahut badh gaya hai. Ab main bank mein aaram se computer operator ka kaam kar raha hoon.

testimonials.name: Priyanka Kumari
testimonials.text: Sir bahut hi accha padhate hai. GST returns aur accounting ab mere liye bahut aasaan hai. Best institute for girls in Gaya.

testimonials.name: Ravi Yadav
testimonials.text: Fees bhi kam hai aur padhai bhi top class. Bihar ke har gaon mein aisi academy honi chahiye.

franchiseProcess.description: Pahle hamare inquiry form ko bharein ya call karein.

franchiseFAQ.question: Bihar mein computer center kholne ke liye kitni jagah chahiye?
franchiseFAQ.answer: Aapko kam se kam 500-800 sq. ft. jagah chahiye jisme ek lab aur ek classroom ban sake.

franchiseFAQ.question: Kya mujhe sikhana aata hona chahiye?
franchiseFAQ.answer: Nahi, hum aapko aur aapke teachers ko poori training denge.

franchiseFAQ.question: Certificate kab milta hai?
franchiseFAQ.answer: Exam ke 15-20 dino ke andar verifiable certificate online upload ho jata hai.

notices.title: New Session Admissions Open
notices.content: April-June batch ke liye DCA aur ADCA mein admission shuru ho gaye hai. Aaj hi apne nazdiki center visit karein.

notices.title: Annual Scholarship Exam
notices.content: Har saal ki tarah is baar bhi mega scholarship test hone wala hai. Top 10 students ko 100% fee discount milega.

notices.title: Tally New Batch
notices.content: Specially designed for commerce students, Tally Prime with GST ka naya batch 1st April se shuru ho raha hai.

notices.title: Certificate Distribution Ceremony
notices.content: Jan-Feb batch ke students apna certificate 25th March ko head office se collect kar sakte hai.

notices.title: Franchise Meet 2024
notices.content: Bihar ke sabhi franchise owners ke liye Patna mein annual meet rakhi gayi hai. Invite cards aapke email par bhej diye gaye hai.

contact.address: Main Road, Opp. SBI Bank, Patna, Bihar - 800001
